# Benchmark Results

*(This file is auto-generated by `python benchmark.py`. Run the script to populate it with real numbers.)*

## How to Generate

```bash
# Quick run on the sample collection
python benchmark.py

# More thorough run on the full collection (3 averaged runs per query)
python benchmark.py --collection full --runs 3
```

## Expected Result Shape

| Query | Before Index | After Index | Improvement | Plan Before | Plan After |
|-------|------------:|------------:|------------:|-------------|------------|
| Q1 — Genre: Action | ~150 ms | ~20 ms | ~7.5× | COLLSCAN | IXSCAN |
| Q2 — Year range 2000–2020 | ~180 ms | ~25 ms | ~7.2× | COLLSCAN | IXSCAN |
| Q3 — Rating ≥ 8.0 | ~210 ms | ~30 ms | ~7.0× | COLLSCAN | IXSCAN |
| Q4 — Votes ≥ 10,000 | ~160 ms | ~22 ms | ~7.3× | COLLSCAN | IXSCAN |
| Q5 — Combined search | ~300 ms | ~40 ms | ~7.5× | COLLSCAN | IXSCAN |

> Actual numbers depend on dataset size, hardware, and MongoDB cache state.
